message:
feat(random,ufunc): implement Philox CBRNG and expand ufunc operations

Philox RNG (fnp-random):
- Implement PhiloxRng counter-based PRNG matching NumPy's Philox implementation
- 10-round Philox4x64 with full counter increment chain and buffer management
- SeedSequence integration via from_seed_sequence()
- Jump-ahead support for parallel stream generation
- mulhilo64 helper for 128-bit multiplication decomposition

ufunc:
- Additional ufunc operation implementations (61 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
